HealingAura.name: PASSIVE_HEALINGAURA_NAME
HealingAura.desc_resolved:
+1 Health Regeneration
Your Health Regeneration also applies to your allies.

2.desc_resolved:
+2 Health Regeneration
Your Health Regeneration also applies to your allies.
You and your allies have uncapped HP.

Your heals heal for 4 extra.
Start each battle at full HP.

Eternal.name: PASSIVE_ETERNAL_NAME
Eternal.desc_resolved: When you are downed for the 1st time each battle, take no injuries and revive with half HP.

2.desc_resolved: When you are downed for the 1st time each battle, take no injuries and revive with half HP, All Stats Up 2, and immediately take an extra turn.

Blessed.name: PASSIVE_BLESSED_NAME
Blessed.desc_resolved: Gain +1 to 2 random stats at the start of each turn.

2.desc_resolved: +3 Health Regeneration Gain +1 to 3 random stats at the start of each turn.

EvilPatron.name: PASSIVE_EVILPATRON_NAME
EvilPatron.desc_resolved:
Your healing abilities deal damage to enemies.
Gain +2 range on tile-targeted healing spells.

2.desc_resolved:
Your healing abilities deal damage to enemies.
Holy element damage you deal is doubled.
Gain +2 range on tile-targeted healing spells.

AngelicInspiration.name: PASSIVE_ANGELICINSPIRATION_NAME
AngelicInspiration.desc_resolved: When you heal an ally, they also gain +2 mana.

2.desc_resolved: When you heal an ally, they also gain mana equal to half the amount healed.

TopOff.name: PASSIVE_TOPOFF_NAME
TopOff.desc_resolved: When you heal another unit over their max HP, you both gain +1 [img:shield].

2.desc_resolved: When you heal another unit over their max HP, you both gain +2 [img:shield].

SharingIsCaring.name: PASSIVE_SHARINGISCARING_NAME
SharingIsCaring.desc_resolved: When you pick up a non-coin pickup, allies gain the same effects.

2.desc_resolved:
When you pick up a non-coin pickup, allies gain the same effects.
Start each battle with pickups nearby.

Caretaker.name: PASSIVE_CARETAKER_NAME
Caretaker.desc_resolved: When you heal another unit, heal yourself for half that amount.

2.desc_resolved: When you heal another unit, heal yourself for the same amount.

MoraleBoost.name: PASSIVE_MORALEBOOST_NAME
MoraleBoost.desc_resolved: Allies gain All Stats Up whenever you kill something.

2.desc_resolved:
Allies gain All Stats Up whenever you kill something.
When you kill something, refresh your basic attack.

RangedMedic.name: PASSIVE_RANGEDMEDIC_NAME
RangedMedic.desc_resolved: Your basic attack is a ranged lobbed attack that heals allies and damages enemies.

2.desc_resolved: +2 Range. Your basic attack is a ranged lobbed attack that heals allies and damages enemies.
When you heal something, gain +4 [img:spd] and +1 to a random stat.

GodWarrior.name: PASSIVE_GODWARRIOR_NAME
GodWarrior.desc_resolved: When you kill an enemy, gain +1 [img:divineshield].

2.desc_resolved: When you kill an enemy, gain +1 [img:divineshield] and refresh your movement action.

BreathOfLife.name: PASSIVE_BREATHOFLIFE_NAME
BreathOfLife.desc_resolved: When you heal a downed unit, revive it.

2.desc_resolved: When you heal a downed unit, revive it and heal it for 3 times the number you healed.

ThouShaltNotKill.name: PASSIVE_THOUSHALTNOTKILL_NAME
ThouShaltNotKill.desc_resolved: When an enemy downs another unit, they take 10 holy damage.

2.desc_resolved: When an enemy downs another unit, they take 10 holy damage and become Stunned.

ThouShaltNotCovet.name: PASSIVE_THOUSHALTNOTCOVET_NAME
ThouShaltNotCovet.desc_resolved: When an enemy takes damage from an ability, it drops a random pickup.

2.desc_resolved: When an enemy takes damage from an ability, it drops 2 random pickups.

BlessingOfHolyFire.name: PASSIVE_BLESSINGOFHOLYFIRE_NAME
BlessingOfHolyFire.desc_resolved:
Holy-element spells deal double damage to enemies instead of healing and inflict Burn 2. 
This blessing is lost when you kill a unit.

2.desc_resolved:
Holy-element spells deal triple damage to enemies instead of healing and inflict Burn 3. 
This blessing is lost when you kill a unit.

AlmsForThePoor.name: PASSIVE_ALMSFORTHEPOOR_NAME
AlmsForThePoor.desc_resolved: When you gain coins, all allies heal +1 HP and gain +1 [img:lck].

2.desc_resolved: When you gain coins, you gain +1 [img:divineshield] and all allies heal HP and gain [img:lck] equal to the number of coins gained.

Purifier.name: PASSIVE_PURIFIER_NAME
Purifier.desc_resolved: Your basic attack removes debuffs from allies.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack removes debuffs from allies and gives them All Stats Up.

VeneratedTouch.name: PASSIVE_VENERATEDTOUCH_NAME
VeneratedTouch.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 2 on enemies and gives +2 [img:shield] to allies.

2.desc_resolved: Your basic attack inflicts Confusion 3 on enemies and has a 50% chance to Stun. It also gives +3 [img:shield] to allies and a 50% chance for All Stats Up.

ProtectTheWeak.name: PASSIVE_PROTECTTHEWEAK_NAME
ProtectTheWeak.desc_resolved: Allies with 5 or fewer HP gain +50% dodge chance.

2.desc_resolved: Allies with 10 or fewer HP gain +50% dodge chance.

ThouShaltObey.name: PASSIVE_THOUSHALTOBEY_NAME
ThouShaltObey.desc_resolved: At the end of each round, inflict Charm on a random adjacent enemy.

2.desc_resolved: At the end of each round, inflict Charm on the closest enemy.

EnchantedRelic.name: PASSIVE_ENCHANTEDRELIC_NAME
EnchantedRelic.desc_resolved: Your trinket's passive and active effects are doubled.

2.desc_resolved: Your trinket's passive and active effects are tripled.

BlessingOfSpirit.name: PASSIVE_BLESSINGOFSPIRIT_NAME
BlessingOfSpirit.desc_resolved: When you end your turn, you and all allies heal 2 HP and gain 2 mana. This blessing is lost when you cast a spell.

2.desc_resolved: When you end your turn, you and all allies heal 3 HP, gain 3 mana and gain +1 to 3 random stats. This blessing is lost when you cast a spell.

Heathens.name: PASSIVE_HEATHENS_NAME
Heathens.desc_resolved: At the start of the battle, inflict Weakness 3 on all enemies.

2.desc_resolved: At the start of the battle, inflict Weakness 4 and Magic Weakness 4 on all enemies.
